column1: He’s got a computer. ... computer is new.
This is a tree. ... tree is green.
I can see three boys. ... boys are playing.
We wrote a dictation yesterday. ... dictation was long.
Last year I gave my mother a bracelet for her birthday. She liked ... bracelet.
She has a ball. ... ball is big.
I got a letter from my  friend yesterday. ... letter was interesting.
This is a pen. ... pen is red.
This is a soup. ... soup is so tasty.
This is a pineapple. ... pineapple is delicious.
